name: AppShell
description: Responsive shell for your application with header, navbar, aside and footer
searchText: appshell responsive shell for your application with header, navbar, aside and footer @mantine/core /core/app-shell aside disabled footer header layout mode navbar offsetscrollbars padding transitionduration transitiontimingfunction withborder zindex withborder zindex withborder zindex withborder zindex withborder zindex

props.name: aside
props.description: Aside configuration, controls width, breakpoints and collapsed state. Required if you use Aside component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, Navbar, Aside, Header and Footer components are hidden

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer configuration, controls height, offset and collapsed state. Required if you use Footer component.

props.name: header
props.description: Header configuration, controls height, offset and collapsed state. Required if you use Header component.

props.name: layout
props.description: Determines how Navbar/Aside are arranged relative to Header/Footer

props.name: mode
props.description: Determines positioning mode of all sections

props.name: navbar
props.description: Navbar configuration, controls width, breakpoints and collapsed state. Required if you use Navbar component.

props.name: offsetScrollbars
props.description: If set, Header and Footer components include styles to offset scrollbars. Based on react-remove-scroll.

props.name: padding
props.description: Padding of the main section. Important: use padding prop instead of p.

props.name: transitionDuration
props.description: Duration of all transitions in ms

props.name: transitionTimingFunction
props.description: Timing function of all transitions

props.name: withBorder
props.description: If set, the associated components have a border

props.name: zIndex
props.description: z-index of all associated elements

props.name: withBorder
props.description: If set, component haves a border, overrides withBorder prop on AppShell component

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Sets z-index. Inherited from the AppShell by default.

props.name: withBorder
props.description: If set, component haves a border, overrides withBorder prop on AppShell component

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Sets z-index. Inherited from the AppShell by default.

props.name: withBorder
props.description: If set, component haves a border, overrides withBorder prop on AppShell component

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Sets z-index. Inherited from the AppShell by default.

props.name: withBorder
props.description: If set, component haves a border, overrides withBorder prop on AppShell component

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Sets z-index. Inherited from the AppShell by default.
